en: Avetta PQF - Spain Payroll Contribution Receipt (TGSS)
Document must be issued within 30 days of submission.

Please upload your company’s most recent Social Security contribution settlement receipt (Recibo de Liquidación de Cotizaciones – RLC) for the latest payroll period.\n\nIf the RLC is not available, upload the payment proof (Justificante de ingreso de cuotas TGSS) for the same period.
As an authorized signatory, I confirm that Payroll Contributions are up-to-date and records are available upon request.
The Issue date must be within the last 30 days
Does your company manage payroll in Spain?
